Title: Monitor Carbon Footprint Dashboard
Preconditions: User has logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main dashboard.
2. Verify that the dashboard displays detailed measurements related to cloud service usage, streaming, social media, web navigation, and battery consumption.
3. Check if the data displayed is up-to-date.
Expected Result: The dashboard should display accurate and up-to-date measurements for each category.

Title: Receive Educational Notifications
Preconditions: User has logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Observe notifications on the screen.
2. Verify that the notifications contain educational content about reducing the environmental impact of digital activities.
3. Check if the notifications are relevant to the user's current activity.
Expected Result: The user should receive relevant and educational notifications.

Title: Earn Virtual Rewards Through Gamification
Preconditions: User has logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Perform actions that reduce the carbon footprint.
2. Check if badges or virtual rewards are earned.
3. Verify that the rewards are displayed in the user profile.
Expected Result: The user should earn badges or virtual rewards for reducing their carbon footprint.

Title: Access Cloud Storage and Services
Preconditions: User has logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cloud storage section.
2. Verify that the user can access and manage files stored in the cloud.
3. Check if the user can upload, download, and delete files.
Expected Result: The user should be able to access, upload, download, and delete files stored in the cloud.

Title: Ensure Application Interacts with Firebase Database
Preconditions: User has logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Perform actions within the application.
2. Verify that the application correctly interacts with the Firebase database.
3. Check if the data is stored and retrieved accurately.
Expected Result: The application should correctly store and retrieve data from the Firebase database.

Title: Support Sustainable Technology Use
Preconditions: User has logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Explore the application features.
2. Verify that the application provides tools and resources to help users adopt sustainable technology practices.
3. Check if the application offers tips and guides for reducing energy consumption and minimizing environmental impact.
Expected Result: The application should provide comprehensive tools and resources to support sustainable technology use.

Preconditions: User has an Android device.

2. Verify that the application runs without issues.
3. Check if the application meets the minimum system requirements.
Expected Result: The application should run smoothly on the user’s Android device and meet the specified system requirements.

Preconditions: User has logged into the application.

3. Check if the updated data is accurate and reflects recent activities.
Expected Result: The application should update the dashboard in real-time to reflect recent activities and data changes.

Title: Visualizza "Consigli Green"
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. The user taps the notification or the dedicated button in the toolbar.
2. A pop-up displaying a green tip appears.
Expected Result: A pop-up with a green tip is shown to the user.

Title: Ricevi Notifica Educativa
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. The daily green tip changes.
2. The application sends a notification to inform the user of the new green tip.
3. If the notification is tapped, the user is redirected to the application where they can view the tip.
Expected Result: A notification is sent to the user informing them of a new green tip. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the application to view the tip.

Title: Ricevi Notifica Traguardo Superato
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. The user achieves a milestone.
2. The application sends a notification to inform the user of the milestone achievement.
3. If the notification is tapped, the user is redirected to the application’s goals page.
Expected Result: A notification is sent to the user informing them of a milestone achievement. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the application’s goals page.

Title: Visualizza Consumi Batteria
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. The user accesses the dedicated page from the toolbar or the main screen.
2. The page displays battery capacity in mAh and its health status.
3. The page shows consumption data and an estimate of its environmental impact, including both electricity consumption and battery degradation.
Expected Result: The page displays battery capacity, health status, and consumption data with an estimated environmental impact.

Title: Visualizza Consumi Rete
Preconditions: The device is connected to a network.
Test Steps:
1. The user accesses the dedicated page from the toolbar or the main screen.
2. The page displays consumption data for each application, both upload and download through the network, divided into mobile network or Wi-Fi usage.
3. The page also shows the trend of consumption over the last few days, highlighted in red for increased consumption or green otherwise.
Expected Result: The page displays consumption data for each application and shows the trend of consumption over the last few days.

Title: Visualizza Sfide ed Obiettivi
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. The user accesses the challenges and objectives page from the toolbar.
2. The page displays a series of daily and weekly missions that reward the user with points that will accumulate to achieve certain objectives and unlock unique badges.
Expected Result: The page displays a series of missions that reward the user with points, which accumulate towards achieving objectives and unlocking badges. If the user completes the missions, points are credited to their account. <|assistant|>
